race.comment: Hinges on the real TAKA SPEED (9) showing up. Promising galloper who stepped up to 2000m at Flemington last time but forced forward and did it tough before dropping right out. Freshened and back too a mile. Previous form stacks right up to this and looks well placed this line-up with the nice weight. PRESSER (6) is close to a win and has been freshened since a near miss over a mile over the border. Overdue and expected to feature. ZOUATICA (3) is a Canberra galloper who dropped back to 1400m in the Listed National Sprint and wasn't far away. Winner of the Bega Cup the start prior. Best figures measure up. KINGS VALLEY (5) was solid enough fresh over 1400m and looks suited by the extra ground. Placed 3/4 second-up. POUNDING (1) has been good in two 1400m runs this time in and will enjoy the extra ground.
